name: Steaks Esterhazy
recipeIngredient: 1 each Shallot or Green Onion, Minced
4 Servings of Steak (Sirloin, T-bone, or Fillet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the shallots or green onions.
2. Combine all ingredients except steak in a saucepan over medium heat.
3. Add butter and sauté mushrooms, carrots, and minced shallots or green onions for 5-7 minutes until vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in paprika, salt, sour cream, and Worcestershire sauce. Simmer for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Place steak on a baking sheet and broil for 2-3 minutes per side until desired doneness is reached.
6. Top each steak with the sauce before serving.
